login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Choose a demo user to explore the platform. Access depends on role and position in the hierarchy.
login.demoNote: Demo only — no real patient data. Identifiable records exist only at facility and registry level.

feat.offline: Works fully offline — syncs when connected
feat.languages: In all six African Union languages
feat.standards: Built on IARC, ICD-O-3, FHIR & DHIS2
feat.privacy: Patient data stays local by design

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.aggregatesOnly: Aggregate view — de-identified counts only (no patient records at this tier).
dashboard.asrApprox: ASR uses a modelled age structure for this demo; production uses census denominators.
dashboard.comparisonNote: Benchmarks shown for context. Read alongside data-quality indicators — differences in coverage and completeness, not only true incidence, drive these gaps.
dashboard.noData: No data in this scope yet.

case.incidenceDateHelp: Earliest of: histological confirmation, admission, first consultation, other diagnosis, or death (DCO).

cases.title: Cases
cases.restricted: Your role sees aggregates only; individual records are not available at this tier.

interop.title: Interoperability
interop.subtitle: Export to international standards.
interop.fhirDesc: A selected case as an HL7 FHIR Bundle following mCODE oncology profiles.
interop.dhis2Desc: De-identified aggregate counts for national HMIS integration.
interop.iarcDesc: Flat case file for CI5 / GLOBOCAN contribution.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aboutText: Afya Cancer Registry is an open-source, offline-first platform aligned to IARC/IACR, ICD-O-3, FHIR/mCODE and DHIS2 standards.

validation.topographyFormat: Invalid topography code: {{code}} (expected ICD-O-3, e.g. C50).
validation.topographyUnknown: Topography {{code}} is not in the loaded code subset.
validation.morphologyUnknown: Morphology {{code}} is not in the loaded code subset.
validation.behaviourMorphology: Behaviour {{behaviour}} is not valid for morphology {{code}}.
validation.behaviourSite: In-situ behaviour is implausible at site {{site}}.
validation.siteHistologyHaem: Lymphoma/leukaemia recorded at solid site {{site}} — expected lymph nodes (C77).
validation.siteHistologyHcc: Hepatocellular carcinoma at site {{site}} — expected liver (C22).
validation.sexSiteFemale: Site {{site}} is female-only but sex is recorded as male.
validation.sexSiteMale: Site {{site}} is male-only but sex is recorded as female.
validation.basisMorphology: Specific histology recorded without a microscopic basis of diagnosis.
validation.dcoVital: Death-certificate-only case but vital status is not 'dead'.
validation.dateBirthIncidence: Date of birth is after the date of incidence.
validation.dateIncidenceDeath: Date of incidence is after the date of death.
validation.dateIncidenceContact: Date of incidence is after the last contact date.
validation.ageRange: Age {{age}} is out of the plausible range (0–120).
validation.ageProstate: Prostate cancer at age {{age}} is unusual — please confirm.
validation.ageCervix: Cervical cancer at age {{age}} is unusual — please confirm.
